testcase.name: test_put_invalid_pexels
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_vidmatic_backend.py:40: in test_put_invalid_pexels assert r.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 got 200: {"message":"Stock API keys updated","has_pexels":true,"has_pixabay":false} E assert 200 == 400 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_stream_range_206
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_vidmatic_backend.py:65: in test_stream_range_206 assert r.status_code == 206, f"Expected 206 got {r.status_code}: {r.text[:200]}" E AssertionError: Expected 206 got 404: {"detail":"Rendered video not available yet"} E assert 404 == 206 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_stream_no_range_200
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_vidmatic_backend.py:71: in test_stream_no_range_200 assert r.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200 got {r.status_code}: {r.text[:200]}" E AssertionError: Expected 200 got 404: {"detail":"Rendered video not available yet"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_download
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_vidmatic_backend.py:77: in test_download assert r.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200 got {r.status_code}: {r.text[:200]}" E AssertionError: Expected 200 got 404: {"detail":"Rendered video not available yet"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_voiceover
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_vidmatic_backend.py:84: in test_voiceover assert r.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200 got {r.status_code}: {r.text[:200]}" E AssertionError: Expected 200 got 404: {"detail":"Voiceover not available"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_publish_fake_channel_404
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_vidmatic_backend.py:94: in test_publish_fake_channel_404 assert r.status_code == 404, f"Expected 404 got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 404 got 400: {"detail":"Rendered video file not found. Please regenerate the video first."} E assert 400 == 404 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
